titles.title: Let the Rain of You Presence

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let the rain of Your presence fall on me Everyday that I live With every breathe I breathe Let the rain of Your presence fall on me Everywhere that I go Lord let Your presence flow Rain on me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord Divine, Joy unspeakable Overflow, Within my soul This heart of mine Is refreshed and at rest In Your presence
